title: Eskom Engineering Learnership 2026
eligibility: South African citizen with valid ID
documents_needed: Certified copy of ID (not older than 3 months)
Proof of residence (not older than 3 months)
description: Eskom's annual learnership programme offers structured workplace learning leading to a nationally recognised NQF qualification. The programme covers electrical, mechanical, and instrumentation disciplines across Eskom's generation, transmission, and distribution divisions.
benefits: NQF Level 4 qualification, monthly stipend, PPE provided, mentorship

title: ABSA Bank Graduate Internship 2026
description: The ABSA Graduate Internship Programme is a 12-month structured programme designed to develop young talent in banking and financial services. Interns rotate across business units including Retail, Corporate, and Digital Banking.
benefits: 12-month contract, structured mentorship, possible permanent placement

title: NSFAS Bursary 2026 — University & TVET Funding
eligibility: Registered or applying to register at a public university or TVET college
documents_needed: Proof of income (parents/guardian — payslips or affidavit)
Matric results or most recent academic record
description: The National Student Financial Aid Scheme (NSFAS) provides funding to eligible South African students at public universities and TVET colleges. NSFAS covers tuition, accommodation, transport, and a living allowance.
benefits: Tuition, accommodation, transport allowance, living allowance (R15 000/year)

title: MICT SETA ICT Learnership 2026
description: The MICT SETA ICT Learnership provides training in Information Technology at NQF Level 4. Learners gain practical experience in IT support, networking, and software fundamentals over 12 months.
benefits: NQF Level 4 IT qualification, practical skills, monthly stipend

title: Transnet Freight Rail Apprenticeship 2026
eligibility: Matric with Mathematics and Physical Science (min 50%)
description: Transnet Freight Rail's Apprenticeship Programme develops qualified artisans in diesel mechanical, electrical, and boilermaking trades. The programme runs for 3 years and leads to a trade certificate recognised nationally.
benefits: Nationally recognised trade certificate, guaranteed employment consideration, full PPE

title: Standard Bank IT Learnership 2026
description: Launch your career in tech with the Standard Bank IT Learnership. This 12-month program provides theoretical and practical training in software development, data analytics, and IT support.
benefits: 12-month stipend, NQF Level 5 qualification in IT

title: Sasol Foundation Bursary 2026
eligibility: Currently in Grade 12 or passed Matric
Must study STEM (Science, Tech, Engineering, Maths)
description: The Sasol Foundation offers comprehensive bursaries to talented individuals planning to pursue full-time undergraduate studies in STEM fields. Supports tuition, accommodation, and provides mentorship.
benefits: Full tuition, accommodation, book allowance, and living stipend

title: Clicks Pharmacy Assistant Learnership
eligibility: Matric with Mathematics/Maths Literacy and English
description: Complete a recognized Basic Pharmacist Assistant qualification while working at a Clicks Pharmacy. You will learn to assist the pharmacist with dispensing, stock control, and customer interactions.
benefits: National Certificate: Pharmacist Assistance (Basic)

title: Anglo American Mining Internship
eligibility: Degree in Mining Engineering, Geology, or Metallurgy
description: Gain practical mining experience with Anglo American. This 12-month program places you in an operational environment where you'll rotate through various technical disciplines.
benefits: Practical experience, competitive graduate salary, mentorship

title: Toyota Manufacturing Apprenticeship
eligibility: Matric with Maths and Science (not Literacy)
Must have NTC3 / N3 in Mechanical or Electrical Engineering
description: Train to become a qualified Millwright, Fitter, or Electrician at the Toyota Prospecton Plant. The apprenticeship includes formal institutional training and on-the-job application.
benefits: Trade Test Certification, technical skills development

title: Shoprite Retail Business Management Learnership
description: Learn the ins and outs of retail management. This learnership covers customer service, merchandising, stock control, and team management within a retail environment.
benefits: NQF Level 4 Retail Qualification, guaranteed interview for permanent placement

title: Funza Lushaka Teaching Bursary
eligibility: Must be accepted into a BEd or PGCE program
Must commit to teaching at a public school after graduation
description: A multi-year programme to promote teaching in public schools. Full-cost bursaries are available to enable eligible students to complete a teaching qualification in an area of national priority.
benefits: Full tuition, accommodation, meals, and book allowance

title: MTN Software Development Internship
eligibility: Degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or Information Systems
documents_needed: CV with link to GitHub or portfolio
description: Join MTN's digital innovation hub as a software development intern. You will work on real-world telecommunications software, apps, and APIs using Java, Python, and cloud technologies.
benefits: Mentorship, hands-on coding experience, flexible working hours

title: FNB Finance & Accounting Learnership
eligibility: National Diploma in Accounting or Finance
description: Develop financial administration skills with FNB. The program provides exposure to corporate accounting, bookkeeping, and financial analysis, culminating in a higher certificate.
benefits: NQF Level 5 Accounting qualification, working at a top bank

title: Western Cape Government Premier's Advancement of Youth (PAY) Project
eligibility: Must have written and passed the National Senior Certificate (NSC) in the Western Cape recently
Must be a South African Citizen residing in the Western Cape
description: A 12-month internship program designed to provide recent matriculants with practical work experience in various Western Cape Government departments.
benefits: 12 months of paid work experience in the public sector, mentorship, upskilling courses

title: MQA TVET Practical Training Programme
eligibility: Must have completed N6 in Engineering (Electrical/Mechanical/Civil)
Require practical experience to obtain National Diploma
documents_needed: Certified N6 certificate and statement of results
Letter from TVET college confirming need for practicals
description: The Mining Qualifications Authority (MQA) supports TVET college students who have completed their N6 theory in obtaining the 18 months of practical workplace experience required to graduate with a National Diploma.
benefits: 18 months practical workplace experience, monthly stipend

title: KPMG Audit & Advisory Learnership
description: Gain practical audit experience with KPMG. Rotations across different audit clients. A pathway to becoming a CA(SA).
benefits: Mentorship, competitive stipend, NQF 6 qualification

title: Mediclinic Nursing Bursary
eligibility: Matric with Maths Literacy or Mathematics
description: Full bursary for nursing students studying towards a Diploma in Nursing. Includes practical training at Mediclinic facilities.
benefits: Full tuition, accommodation, and book allowance

title: BMW Group Technician Apprenticeship
eligibility: Matric with Core Mathematics and Physics
description: A 3-year apprenticeship programme to qualify as a motor mechanic or auto-electrician at BMW Plant Rosslyn.
benefits: Trade test, technical skills, competitive stipend

title: Capitec Digital Banking Internship
eligibility: Degree in IT, Computer Science, or Data Science
description: Join the innovative tech team at Capitec Bank. Work on digital banking solutions, mobile apps, and data analytics over 18 months.
benefits: Mentorship, 18-month contract, relocation assistance if needed

title: SABC Radio Production Learnership
description: Learn the essentials of radio production, sound engineering, and broadcasting with the national broadcaster. 12-month program.
benefits: NQF Level 4 qualification in Radio Production

title: Vodacom Data Science Internship
eligibility: BSc in Data Science, Statistics, or Computer Science
description: A 12-month internship focusing on big data, machine learning models, and customer analytics within the telecommunications sector.
benefits: Competitive stipend, cutting-edge tech exposure

title: Sanlam Financial Planning Learnership
description: Start a career as a financial advisor. This 12-month learnership provides you with an NQF Level 4 qualification in Wealth Management.
benefits: Commission potential, NQF 4 certificate

title: SAMRC Biomedical Sciences Bursary
eligibility: Currently enrolled in a BSc Hons or Masters in Biomedical Sciences
description: Funding for postgraduate students pursuing research in health, infectious diseases, and biomedical sciences.
benefits: Tuition, research costs, and a living allowance

title: Unilever Supply Chain Graduate Internship
eligibility: BCom Supply Chain or Engineering degree
description: A robust 2-year graduate programme rotating through logistics, manufacturing, and planning within one of the world's largest consumer goods companies.
benefits: Accelerated career path, extensive training

title: Distell Winemaking Apprenticeship
eligibility: Keen interest in agriculture and winemaking
description: Learn the art and science of winemaking. This 3-year apprenticeship covers cellar operations, quality control, and fermentation management.
benefits: Trade certificate, practical cellar experience

title: PwC Corporate Tax Learnership
description: Gain specialized skills in corporate taxation. Assist in tax compliance, computations, and consulting under the guidance of senior tax managers.
benefits: NQF 5 qualification, networking, professional growth

title: Old Mutual Tech Talent Bursary
eligibility: Applied or accepted for a BSc IT, Computer Science, or Actuarial Science
description: A comprehensive bursary for top academic achievers looking to pursue technology or actuarial studies. Includes a guaranteed role upon graduation.
benefits: Full tuition, accommodation, meals, book allowance, and a laptop
